description: Composition Yellow round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with puma Leaping cat printed on the left sleeve, and graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Wash and iron inside-out Gentle machine wash in cool water with like colours, using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Spread some common sense in style with this T-shirt from puma. Designed for the carefree soul, this T-shirt is crafted from soft cotton offering exemplary comfort, making it a perfect casual wear. Team it with jeans and sports shoes or classy floaters. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
